response_parsed.Precondition: The right arm can reach the left side of box_red_1 and the tabletop area to the right of the stack is free, allowing the red box to slide safely without colliding with other objects.
response_parsed.Postcondition: box_red_1 is no longer on top of box_green_1 and rests on the tabletop to the right of box_green_1.

response_parsed.Precondition: box_green_1 is fully exposed with no objects on top or immediately to its sides, and both arms have sufficient clearance to approach from left and right.
response_parsed.Postcondition: box_green_1 is firmly secured between the two arms and lifted slightly off the tabletop, under the robot’s control.
